Nike Q2 Earnings: Revenue Beat, EPS Beat, Shares Jump — 'Nike Being Nike Again'
data.description: Nike reports second-quarter revenue of $12.35 billion, beating analyst estimates of $12.13 billion. The company reports second-quarter earnings of 78 cents per share, beating analyst estimates of 65 cents per share.

data.title: FedEx Stock Rallies On Better-Than-Expected Q2 EPS, Freight Spin-Off Announcement
data.description: FedEx reports its second-quarter results after Thursday's closing bell and announced the spin off of FedEx Freight.
